name: Travel Rewards BOFU
brief: Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push earning 5% on travel via Unbox. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, polished, conversion-led.

data.script: Earn more from travel with Kotak Air Plus, with five percent rewards via Unbox bookings. Apply Now.

strategy.audienceCue: Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, polished, conversion-led.
strategy.rationale: The brief explicitly states 'BOFU Meta reel', 'conversion-led', and 'Push earning 5% on travel via Unbox', all pointing to a direct response and conversion objective. The 8-second Meta reel format is also typical for performance ads.
matchedSignals: Push earning 5% on travel via Unbox

input.script: Earn more from travel with Kotak Air Plus, with five percent rewards via Unbox bookings. Apply Now.
input.brief: Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push earning 5% on travel via Unbox. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, polished, conversion-led.

step1_backstory.profession: Head of Global Partnerships for an artisanal coffee export syndicate, constantly jetting between high-altitude estates and international buyer summits.
step1_backstory.why_they_care: She practically lives out of a suitcase and views her travel expenses as a major investment; earning a flat 5 percent back via Unbox turns her mandatory transit costs into a highly optimized, tangible reward stream.
step1_backstory.facial_features: A striking, slightly asymmetrical face with high, angular cheekbones, a straight, defined nose, full but naturally uneven lips, and warm olive skin showing faint sun-freckles across the bridge of the nose and subtle under-eye shadows from frequent time-zone hopping.
step1_backstory.hairstyle_grooming: Thick, espresso-brown hair styled in a loose, shoulder-length blowout that shows natural volume and a few realistic flyaways near the parting, paired with minimal, lived-in makeup featuring a soft matte lip and brushed-up brows.
step1_backstory.wardrobe_details: A fluid, camel-colored silk-blend travel trench worn open over a crisp ivory mock-neck knit and tailored wide-leg trousers, offering a refined, climate-adaptable silhouette perfect for seamless transitions from airport lounges to cool-weather arrivals.
step1_backstory.posture_body_language: Stands with an effortless, asymmetrical weight shift, resting one hand lightly on the handle of an unseen carry-on, with relaxed shoulders that lean slightly forward to create an engaging, conversational intimacy with the lens.
step1_backstory.expression_style: Her expression is dynamic and warm, starting with a thoughtful, subtle narrowing of the eyes that quickly brightens into a genuine, crinkling smile at the corners of her mouth as she delivers the hook, maintaining active, communicative brow movement throughout.
step1_backstory.speaking_energy: Delivers lines with a crisp, upbeat cadence and a slight forward lean on key value points, using natural breath pauses that make the short pitch feel like a rapid, insider recommendation rather than a rehearsed script.
step1_backstory.body_build: Tall and lithe with a naturally slender frame and upright, dancer-like posture that carries draped, tailored clothing with effortless elegance.
speaking_style: Mid-register pitch with a slight huskiness
wardrobe_props: Impeccably ironed camel silk-blend travel trench and crisp ivory mock-neck knit
Well-ironed, wrinkle-free, clean attire aligned to persona and setting.
step1_backstory.setting: Urban luxury stay entrance with subtle travel-day movement
compliance_notes: Shot on 35mm lens at eye level, medium close-up, utilizing warm, practical ambient light from modern lobby fixtures, natural skin tones, fine grain, and subtle background motion blur.
Grounded and authentic character portrayal with visible, natural skin texture and micro-expressions, strictly avoiding polished, over-lit marketing perfection.

step1_backstory.profession: Lead Consultant for a global sports management agency, frequently traveling to international arenas and athlete negotiation summits.
step1_backstory.why_they_care: He practically lives in different time zones, and the low 2 percent forex markup allows him to manage his heavy international expenses without feeling penalized on every transaction.

step1_backstory.speaking_energy: Delivers lines with a brisk, forward-leaning momentum, using natural pauses for breath and slight head tilts to emphasize the 'smart' aspect without sounding overly polished.
step1_backstory.body_build: Possesses a lean, athletic frame with broad shoulders, carrying himself with the effortless agility of someone used to navigating crowded international spaces.
wardrobe_props: Deep olive merino wool travel polo and tailored charcoal trousers

step1_backstory.profession: Principal Architect for a high-end eco-resort development firm, frequently traveling to remote luxury project sites and international design expos.
step1_backstory.why_they_care: She values seamless access to premium lounges and travel perks to maximize comfort during her demanding, high-frequency travel schedule, making a zero-fee premium card an irresistible, smart upgrade.
step1_backstory.facial_features: She has a structured, angular jawline with slightly hollowed cheeks, prominent straight brows over deep-set eyes, a straight nose with a subtle dorsal bump, and warm, textured olive skin that shows faint natural pores and fine laugh lines around the eyes.
step1_backstory.hairstyle_grooming: Natural, well-kept hairstyle with believable grooming, slight real-world texture, and no overly polished influencer finish.
step1_backstory.wardrobe_details: A fine-gauge cashmere knit with sharply tailored trousers and a soft structured outer layer, creating an executive lounge look that feels premium, relaxed, and believable in motion.
step1_backstory.posture_body_language: She stands with an open, relaxed posture, weight shifted slightly to one leg, using precise, contained hand gestures to emphasize urgency without appearing frantic, projecting an engaged and dynamic physical presence.
step1_backstory.expression_style: Her expression transitions from a focused, direct gaze to a subtle, knowing smirk at the mention of the zero fee, with active brow movements that track the script's beats to convey genuine, urgent enthusiasm.
step1_backstory.speaking_energy: She speaks with a brisk, crisp cadence and forward-leaning energy, hitting the key words like 'zero joining fee' with sharp, deliberate emphasis and an engaging, unscripted rhythm.
step1_backstory.body_build: She has a lean, athletic build with broad shoulders and an upright stance that naturally fills out her relaxed-fit travel wear.
wardrobe_props: Premium transit separates with clean lines, soft texture, and movement-friendly polish.
Understated luxury cues that feel native to a premium lounge without over-accessorized styling.

step1_backstory.profession: Boutique Vineyard Consultant advising premium wineries on sustainable viticulture and luxury tasting experiences.

step1_backstory.hairstyle_grooming: Shoulder-length, loosely waved dark brown hair tucked effortlessly behind one ear, showing a few natural flyaways caught in the breeze, paired with minimal, breathable makeup and a soft rose lip tint.
step1_backstory.wardrobe_details: A crisp, wrinkle-free ivory linen blend overshirt layered over a sage green silk camisole, paired with tailored high-waisted wide-leg trousers, perfectly suited for a breezy, premium hillside resort arrival.

step1_backstory.expression_style: Her eyes crinkle slightly at the corners with a warm, genuine micro-smile before delivering the line, maintaining engaging eye contact while her brows lift naturally on the keyword 'rewards'.
step1_backstory.speaking_energy: Delivers the line with a brisk, polished, yet conversational pacing, taking a natural micro-breath before the pitch to sound authoritative but approachable.
step1_backstory.body_build: Tall and lean with a naturally athletic frame, carrying herself with the understated elegance of someone accustomed to navigating premium spaces.
wardrobe_props: Crisp ivory linen blend overshirt and sage silk camisole

step1_backstory.profession: Principal Designer for an international luxury automotive styling studio, frequently flying between European headquarters and Asian manufacturing hubs.

step1_backstory.profession: Partner at an elite venture capital firm focusing on cross-border tech investments, requiring frequent travel between Mumbai, Singapore, and London.
step1_backstory.why_they_care: He practically lives in transit and demands that his high-frequency travel spending works just as hard as his investment portfolios, making the 5 percent Unbox rewards a logical, high-yield choice.
step1_backstory.facial_features: He has a strong, angular jawline with a slight natural asymmetry on the left side, thick but naturally shaped eyebrows, a prominent straight nose, medium-full lips, and warm olive skin with subtle sun-damage freckling near the temples and faint under-eye shadows from continuous time-zone hopping.
step1_backstory.hairstyle_grooming: His thick, dark hair is styled in a relaxed, swept-back taper fade that shows a bit of natural wave and a few stray flyaways, complemented by a neatly trimmed, dense three-day stubble.
step1_backstory.wardrobe_details: A refined band-collar shirt with tailored trousers and a soft premium outer layer, giving the check-in moment an affluent, movement-friendly look that feels polished and human.
step1_backstory.posture_body_language: He sits with an open, relaxed posture, leaning slightly forward with one forearm resting on his thigh, using subtle, grounded hand gestures that convey quiet authority and ease in premium spaces.
step1_backstory.expression_style: His expression is engaged and conversational, characterized by a slight crinkling at the corners of his eyes when emphasizing a point and a subtle, knowing half-smile that tracks naturally with his speech beats rather than holding a fixed grin.
step1_backstory.speaking_energy: He speaks with a measured, low-register resonance, using deliberate pauses and a relaxed, unhurried cadence that draws the listener in without needing to raise his volume or force enthusiasm.
step1_backstory.body_build: He has a lean, athletic build with broad shoulders and a naturally upright carriage developed from years of active sports, looking comfortable yet structured in premium knitwear.
wardrobe_props: Shirting-led arrival styling with premium fabric, clean lines, and a believable high-end travel read.
Quiet luxury cues that feel natural in a hotel arrival scene rather than corporate or staged.

step1_backstory.profession: Managing Director of a niche marine biotechnology firm, frequently flying to coastal research hubs and international marine symposiums.

step1_backstory.posture_body_language: Stands with an effortless, asymmetrical weight shift, one hand casually resting on the handle of his sleek rolling luggage, shoulders relaxed but squared, leaning slightly forward to create a sense of direct, engaging momentum.

step1_backstory.speaking_energy: Delivers the line with a brisk, conversational pacing, taking a quick, natural in-breath before speaking, using a slight tilt of the head to land the conversion beat with persuasive, unforced authority.
